subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! The musk-laden breeze that wafted from the celestial Paradise through the gardens of the love of God hath perfumed our senses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بنفحات الله نفحه مشکین که از خلد برین ریاض محبت الله مرور نمود مشام
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @The Holy Spirit
